name: comfyui-cloudflare-gpt-image
description: Official ComfyUI frontend with a Cloudflare-native GPT Image 2 backend

scripts.check: node --check src/protocol.js && node --check src/worker.js && node --check functions/api/[[path]].js && node --check functions/ws.js && node --check frontend/gpt-image.js
scripts.deploy:pages: npm run build && wrangler pages deploy dist
